verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whenever I see Your face Them all of my fears will fly. Whenever I clearly hear, The times when I ask You why. Whenever I feel Your arms, Whenever You hold me close For then I will see Your face As I am found in You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now the heavens can be home For my spirit has been freed And my soul, it rests in You And Your life is found in me. And this death, it ends in life With this faith, in love fulfilled, And my eyes will finally see Your face.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lead me to know You more, And help me to understand. You cause me to see in faith All of Your dreams and plans. For faith is perfected now For living and loving You In hope never wavering Completely found in You.
